Release artifacts for Codex Desktop RTL v0.1.0.

Windows:
  CodexDesktopRTL.exe
  CodexDesktopRTL-v0.1.0-Windows.zip

Verify hashes with:
  Get-FileHash .\CodexDesktopRTL.exe -Algorithm SHA256
  Get-FileHash .\CodexDesktopRTL-v0.1.0-Windows.zip -Algorithm SHA256

Expected hashes are listed in CHECKSUMS.txt.
